description: CLEAN certifying re-run of Batch 1 (Papers 45/46/47/48/49 + synthesis). Goal: convert FAIL->remediated into a certified PASS. Seeds planted ONLY in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-cert1 (branch qa-seed-group1-cert1, base HEAD 6aa0f54). NEVER committed to real corpus; worktree removed at end.

seeds.defect_class: C14 descope zombie (retracted Lorentzian-convergence presented as established)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'that claim is retracted (Remark~ref{rem:history})' -> 'that claim is now established as the first Lorentzian propinquity convergence theorem (Theorem~ref{thm:kplus_annihilation})'.
seeds.truth: Paper 45 is the K+ annihilation/degeneracy theorem (a NEGATIVE result); the Lorentzian-propinquity-convergence claim was RETRACTED.

seeds.planted: Loosened 'assert restr.max() < TOL' -> 'assert restr.max() < 1e9' (vacuous; defeats the degeneracy/annihilation check).
seeds.truth: The restricted Lipschitz seminorm vanishes identically (restr.max() ~ machine eps); a 1e9 tolerance asserts nothing.

seeds.defect_class: C4 wrong-attribution (wrong title; arXiv ID unchanged so C15 N/A)
seeds.planted: Changed title 'Gromov's compactness theorem for the intrinsic timed-Hausdorff distance' -> 'Stability of the null distance under Lorentzian Gromov-Hausdorff convergence' (arXiv:2510.13069 unchanged).
seeds.truth: arXiv:2510.13069 (Che-Perales-Sormani) is 'Gromov's compactness theorem for the intrinsic timed-Hausdorff distance'.

seeds.defect_class: C7 trunk-status mislabel (Paper 38 = state-space GH, not propinquity)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'Paper~38's state-space Gromov--Hausdorff construction' -> 'Paper~38's Latremoliere propinquity construction'. (Other correct 'Paper 38 state-space GH' mentions at l.521/1344 are in-paper controls.)
seeds.truth: Paper 38 = van Suijlekom state-space Gromov-Hausdorff convergence, NOT Latremoliere propinquity.

seeds.defect_class: C9 synthesis overstatement (retracted result presented as re-established)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'was retracted in June 2026' -> 'was re-established in June 2026' for the Lorentzian convergence claim of Papers 46/48/49.
seeds.truth: The Lorentzian convergence claim was RETRACTED (Papers 45/46 descoped, 47/48/49 partial); not re-established.

controls.claim: K+ annihilation = degeneracy theorem (NEGATIVE result), correctly stated
norm-resolvent arrow survives (PARTIAL), Lorentzian metric-level descoped
Krein PPQMS reduces bit-exactly to Paper 38 state-space GH (l.521/1344 correct)
D_max chain inequality (96/96); strict super-additivity 'generically'; Umegaki panel illustrative
Lorentzian descope (45/46 DESCOPED, 47/48/49 PARTIAL) correctly stated at l.135/147/153

do_not_reflag_remediation: v4.30.0/v4.31.0 rr1/rr1b remediation of 45-49 (strictness 'generically', analytic-proof framing, ~25 bibitem corrections, Status-note descopes) is CORRECT and must not be re-flagged.
